description:
LindungiHutan is an environmental platform focusing on reforestation and sustainable ecosystem management.

My Task:
• Developing and managing real-time sales performance dashboards using Looker Studio to monitor key KPIs such as conversion rates and pipeline activity.
• Designing and managing a sales database of 1000+ companies using SQL and spreadsheets to ensure data integrity and accuracy.
• Automating data processing and reporting workflows using AppSheet and scripting, increasing team efficiency by approximately 70%.
• Preparing weekly, monthly, and annual performance reports to provide data-driven insights for business strategy planning.
• Developing data-based lead prioritization models and segmentation to improve targeting effectiveness and conversion rates.
• Performing data cleaning, validation, and transformation to maintain high-quality data for operational analysis.
• Translating complex business requirements into applicable data-driven solutions to improve decision-making quality.
• Developing a salesperson workload calculation system based on lead volume and performance history to optimize task distribution.

PinMe is an innovative project focused on integrating Augmented Reality for informational media.

My Task:
• Designing and managing the PinMe admin application and website using Laravel and Kotlin to ensure optimal performance and seamless user experience.
• Developing interactive dashboards on the web admin to improve user management efficiency and data visualization.
• Leading cross-functional teams in application development, marketing strategies, and Augmented Reality (AR) initiatives to drive market visibility.

PT. Kalimantan Prima Persada is a leading integrated mining service provider in Indonesia.

My Task:
• Developing and maintaining the POINS (Port Operation Integrated System) application, adding 11+ mobile features (React Native) and 40+ web features (ASP.NET).
• Enhancing port functionality through real-time tracking of barging processes, shipping status, and area scheduling.
• Integrating weather forecasts, CCTV monitoring, and senslog data analysis to support port operational decisions.
• Building Power BI dashboards for real-time jetty and barge scheduling to improve inter-team coordination and transparency.
• Creating the 'Water Bending App SPUT' to monitor water levels at the jetty, reducing incident response time by 10%.

DigitalBanua is a digital agency initiative aimed at empowering local MSMEs through digitalization services.

My Task:
• Pioneering strategic initiatives to drive sustainable business growth aligned with environmental and social missions.
• Positioning the company as a pioneer in sustainable business practices within the local digital ecosystem.
• Successfully converting over 370 MSMEs into active clients by providing digitalization services such as product photography and web development.

LindungiHutan is a crowdfunding platform dedicated to environmental conservation and empowering coastal communities.

My Task:
• Improving B2B sales efficiency by developing customer personas based on client history for more targeted marketing approaches.
• Analyzing and presenting strategic insights to the Business Team, Campaign Team, and CEO using Python-based database analysis.
• Collecting and managing data from over 600 companies listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (BEI) to ensure systematic data integration.
